home.heroTitle: Explore the World, One Adventure at a Time
home.heroSubtitle: Professional tour services for travelers worldwide

meta.homeDesc: Professional tour services for global travelers. Discover curated tours, book instantly, travel with ease.
meta.toursDesc: Browse all available tours, filter by type, and find the perfect itinerary for your next trip.
meta.aboutDesc: Learn about GlobalTours — our team, our mission, and our commitment to making travel unforgettable.

about.title: About Us
about.mission: We're dedicated to delivering professional, caring travel experiences for global travelers — making every journey an unforgettable chapter of life. With deep roots in the North American tour market and bilingual service, we make every trip worry-free.
about.feature1Desc: Our licensed guides know local culture and history inside out, providing bilingual service every step of the way.
about.feature2Desc: Select tours offer instant confirmation so you can lock in your itinerary without the wait and plan with confidence.
about.feature3Desc: From North America to Europe and the Asia Pacific, we cover the world's most sought-after destinations in one place.

agent.title: Agent Portal
agent.accessDeniedDesc: This page is for authorized travel agents only. Contact your account manager to request agent access.
agent.step1: Browse tours and add to cart as normal
agent.step2: Enter your client's name and contact in the checkout notes
agent.step3: Forward the confirmation email to your client after payment

bookings.title: My Bookings
bookings.emptyHint: Your confirmed trips will appear here after your first booking
bookings.errorLoading: Failed to load orders. Please try again later.

common.error: Something went wrong, please try again
